subject: (no subject)
body:
Lets first decribe what this is not.... THere has been
absolutly not even the slightest allegation of
coercive or aggresive behavior on the part of mr
epstein... In fact this situation has developed simply
as a result of a massage therapist being  sent to the
house,who knowingly presented false identification as
to her age.. Mr epstein, a bachelor who has sponsored
the massage program at ballet florida,, is a health
afficiando, who excercises , with a professional
trainer every day, and  receives daily massages. was 
shocked at the authorities decsion to move forward 
based on these facts.,
